name: Baked Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the margarine over medium heat.
2. Add celery and onion; cook about 4 minutes or until tender. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in the mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until well blended.
4. Add chicken, almonds, and mushrooms; toss to coat well.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle with potato chips.
7. Bake in a 325-degree oven for 25-30 minutes or until hot.
